items.title_en: CEO of Southeast Asia’s largest bank names the 'new war' keeping her up at night
items.title_zh: 东南亚最大银行首席执行官称“新战争”让她彻夜难眠
items.desc_en: For DBS CEO Tan Su Shan, the biggest risk keeping her up at night is not just market volatility or geopolitical shocks, but cyberattacks.
items.desc_zh: 对于星展银行首席执行官谭素山来说，让她夜不能寐的最大风险不仅仅是市场波动或地缘政治冲击，还有网络攻击。

items.title_en: EU decides on key €90bn Ukraine loan after pipeline deadlock ends
items.title_zh: 管道僵局结束后欧盟决定向乌克兰提供900亿欧元关键贷款
items.desc_en: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.desc_zh: 这笔资金是去年12月达成的，但由于俄罗斯向匈牙利供应石油而被搁置。

items.title_en: Two ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz, UK says, after U.S. extends Iran ceasefire
items.title_zh: 英国称，美国延长伊朗停火协议后，两艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击
items.desc_en: The attacks come shortly after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would extend the ceasefire with Iran to allow peace talks to continue.
items.desc_zh: 在唐纳德·特朗普总统表示美国将延长与伊朗的停火以允许和平谈判继续进行后不久，袭击发生了。

items.title_en: Lawmakers seek to override state data privacy laws with new bill
items.title_zh: 立法者寻求通过新法案推翻州数据隐私法
items.desc_en: Pair of bills would create a national standard and prevent individuals from suing companies.
items.desc_zh: 两项法案将制定国家标准并防止个人起诉公司。

items.title_en: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots snapping pictures, report finds
items.title_zh: 报告发现，韩国战斗机因飞行员拍照而相撞
items.desc_en: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.desc_zh: 其中一名飞行员被军方罚款数千美元，以支付维修费用。

items.desc_en: He denied making a deal with Donald Trump on interest rates and backed "policy regime change" at the central bank.
items.desc_zh: 他否认与唐纳德·特朗普就利率问题达成协议，并支持央行“政策体制变革”。

items.title_en: Marvell stands to gain from boosted Amazon-Anthropic partnership
items.title_zh: Marvell 将从加强 Amazon-Anthropic 合作伙伴关系中获益
items.desc_en: Anthropic deal will benefit Amazon's chip and optical partners
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 交易将使亚马逊的芯片和光学合作伙伴受益

items.title_en: Amazon launches GLP-1 weight loss program, promising 'fast, convenient' access
items.title_zh: 亚马逊推出GLP-1减肥计划，承诺“快速、便捷”
items.desc_en: Through Amazon Pharmacy, patients will be able to access medications including Novo Nordisk's Wegovy as well as newer oral GLP-1 options.
items.desc_zh: 通过亚马逊药房，患者将能够获得药物，包括诺和诺德的 Wegovy 以及更新的口服 GLP-1 选择。

items.title_en: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
items.title_zh: 伊朗因与美国和以色列的战争而大规模裁员
items.desc_en: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.desc_zh: 制造商、零售商和数字行业都感受到了这种影响，并警告称，如果战争重新爆发，情况可能会变得更糟。

items.title_en: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 以色列士兵因在黎巴嫩破坏耶稣雕像而受到惩罚
items.desc_en: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方表示，两名士兵将被解除战斗职责并接受 30 天的军事拘留。

items.title_en: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基表示美国特使未能访问基辅是“不尊重”
items.desc_en: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.
items.desc_zh: 美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和唐纳德·特朗普的女婿贾里德·库什纳曾多次前往莫斯科，但从未去过基辅。

items.title_en: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?

items.desc_zh: 随着蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 宣布辞去苹果公司最高职位，这些都是新任老板约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 面临的主要挑战。

items.desc_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接管这家科技巨头的运营。

items.desc_zh: 亚马逊亿万富翁杰夫·贝索斯创立的公司正在调查此次失败的发射。

items.desc_zh: 这位科技亿万富翁是否会参加巴黎检察官要求的面谈还有待观察。

items.title_zh: 由于对神话模型的担忧，白宫和 Anthropic 搁置了法庭诉讼以进行会面

items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统此前曾批评该公司拒绝广泛的政府要求。

items.title_en: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
items.title_zh: Tinder 和 Zoom 提供“人性证明”眼部扫描来对抗人工智能
items.desc_en: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。

items.title_en: What is Claude Mythos and what risks does it pose?
items.title_zh: 什么是克劳德神话？它会带来什么风险？
items.desc_en: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.
items.desc_zh: 该公司声称人工智能工具可以在某些黑客和网络安全任务上超越人类，这引发了金融界的担忧。
